texto: And I think a long time ago there were big stories. Stories so big you could live your whole life in them. The Powerful Hands of the Gods and Fate. The Journey to Enlightenment. The March of Socialism. But they all died or the world grew up or grew senile or forgot them, so now we're making up our own stories. Little stories. But we've each got one.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Ravenhill sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “And I think a long time ago there were big stories. Stories so big you could live your whole life…” articula reflexao, meaning-of-life, stories em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
